questions.prompt: Which element means 'this text is important'?
questions.explanation: <strong> conveys importance semantically. <b> is purely visual.

questions.prompt: Which element means 'stress emphasis when read aloud'?
questions.explanation: <em> = stress emphasis. <i> is just italic style (like a book title).

options: Highlighting a search match in results
questions.explanation: <mark> means relevance in current context — like highlighted search hits.
<code> for inline, <pre><code> for a formatted code block.

questions.prompt: Which tells screen readers to skip a decorative element?
questions.explanation: aria-hidden hides from assistive tech but keeps visible on screen.
<q> for inline. <blockquote> for block-level long quotes.
